summary: v2.0.0-rc.16 'Config + i18n closure' — Phase 3 of the 5-phase post-grill backlog. F2 (banner i18n) lands first: 6 banners across fabric-hint.cjs (5) and knowledge-hint-broad.cjs (1) move from hardcoded Chinese strings to a shared lib/banner-i18n.cjs that honors fabric_language across 4 variants. F1 (fab config TUI) replaces the rc.15 placeholder with a clack panel driven by a new schema-introspection helper, scoped to Group A (locale, 2 fields) + Group B (hint thresholds, 7-8 fields) + Group C (audit, 1 field).
approach: Strict-ordered DAG with two parallelizable prep tracks: F2-prep (TASK-001 banner-i18n lib) and F1-introspect (TASK-005 panel metadata) run in parallel. F2-apply (TASK-002 + TASK-003) fan out from TASK-001. F2-tests (TASK-004) merges TASK-002+003. F1-panel (TASK-006) merges TASK-005+002+003 — enforces F2-before-F1 at the dependency level. F1-tests (TASK-007) follows TASK-006. Release task (TASK-008) merges TASK-004+007 for batched Gemini review + coverage + version bump per memory/feedback_review_batching.md. Each task = one semantic git commit per memory/project_grill_deferred_items.md. Pre-user clean-slate (no migration shim) and drift→abort (no --force) per CLI design memory. Critical-path length: 5 nodes (TASK-001 → TASK-002 → TASK-006 → TASK-007 → TASK-008).
estimated_time: 3-5 hours (F2 ~1.5h: TASK-001 30m + TASK-002 30m + TASK-003 15m + TASK-004 30m; F1 ~2-3h: TASK-005 45m + TASK-006 90m + TASK-007 45m; release ~30-45m: TASK-008)

design_decisions.decision: Banner i18n lives in a NEW packages/cli/templates/hooks/lib/banner-i18n.cjs rather than reusing the TS i18n.ts
design_decisions.rationale: Hooks run as raw .cjs scripts at install-target workspaces — they cannot import from @fenglimg/fabric-shared at runtime. The session-digest-writer.cjs precedent already establishes the hooks/lib/*.cjs pattern.
design_decisions.tradeoff: Two i18n surfaces (TS for CLI commands, .cjs for hooks); offset by clean separation and zero-dependency hook scripts.
alternatives: Inline string tables in each hook (rejected: 6 banners × 2 files = duplication)
Bundle TS i18n into hooks at install time (rejected: install complexity)
JSON-only string table (rejected: needs template substitution functions)

design_decisions.decision: match-existing and unknown fabric_language values default to 'en' in banner rendering (NOT zh-CN)
design_decisions.rationale: UX i18n Policy class 1 rule cited in planning-context.md — explicit class 1 default is English to keep the surface predictable for new workspaces and CI environments.
design_decisions.tradeoff: Existing zh-CN-by-default tests may need cosmetic update to assert English-on-fallback explicitly; flagged as anti-regression check in TASK-002 and TASK-003.
alternatives: Default to zh-CN (rejected: contradicts class 1 policy)
Default to detected node locale (rejected: hooks should honor workspace-level config, not user-machine env)

design_decisions.decision: fab config panel field list driven by getPanelFields() schema introspection helper, NOT a hardcoded list in config.ts
design_decisions.rationale: Single source of truth — adding a new panel-eligible field requires only one PanelFieldMeta entry, not parallel edits in command code. Aligns with 'data, not code' principle for configuration surfaces.
design_decisions.tradeoff: Adds ~150 LOC helper module; offset by ~150 LOC removed from config.ts and zero hardcoded enum/default duplication.
alternatives: Hardcode field list in config.ts (rejected: future Group D/E exposure becomes a multi-file edit)
Generate at build time from Zod annotations (rejected: build complexity not justified at current scale)

design_decisions.decision: Uninit workspace path errors with hint to run `fab install` instead of auto-bootstrapping
design_decisions.rationale: Honors drift→abort principle (memory/feedback_cli_design.md) and clean-slate preference (memory/feedback_clean_slate.md). Auto-bootstrap on a config-edit command would surprise users who expected a no-op or explicit error.
design_decisions.tradeoff: One extra step for new users — explicit install before first config edit; offset by predictable command semantics.
alternatives: Auto-bootstrap with confirmation (rejected: violates drift→abort, no --force)
Silently create empty fabric.config.json (rejected: hides workspace state from user)

design_decisions.decision: Single batched Gemini review + coverage in TASK-008 release, NOT per-task
design_decisions.rationale: memory/feedback_review_batching.md explicitly directs this for multi-task lite-plan chains — one coherent review with full changeset context outperforms 7 fragmented per-task reviews.
design_decisions.tradeoff: Critical issues found at release time may require rework rolling back to earlier tasks; mitigated by clear-DAG-stage commits enabling targeted revert/fix without affecting unrelated work.
alternatives: Skip Gemini review entirely (rejected: F1 panel is substantial new surface)

design_decisions.decision: F2-before-F1 enforced via TASK-006 depending on TASK-002 + TASK-003 (in addition to TASK-005)
design_decisions.rationale: User spec explicitly mandates strict F2 → F1 order: panel UX has no value if hook banners still render Chinese-only when user sets fabric_language to en. Encoding the order as DAG edges (rather than just procedural intent) makes parallel execution safe.
design_decisions.tradeoff: TASK-006 has 3 upstream dependencies, slightly limiting parallelism; offset by correctness guarantee.
alternatives: Procedural ordering only with TASK-006 depending only on TASK-005 (rejected: weaker guarantee under parallel runners)

conventions: Each task = one semantic git commit (per memory/project_grill_deferred_items.md)
Pre-user clean-slate: no migration shim, no v1 compat (per memory/feedback_clean_slate.md)
Batched Gemini review + coverage at end of multi-task chains (per memory/feedback_review_batching.md)
Atomic write via @fenglimg/fabric-shared/node/atomic-write helpers (write tmp + rename)
Hooks must remain dependency-free standalone .cjs scripts at install target
Substring contracts in test assertions are load-bearing — translation MUST preserve them

outstanding_clarifications: Group B field count: user spec said 8, schema enumeration in planning-context.md lists 7. TASK-005 includes archive_edit_threshold to reach 8 (also a Group B hint threshold per its docstring at fabric-config.ts:86). Implementation should verify and document the final count in code comment.

Default-language regression: existing fabric-hint and knowledge-hint-broad tests likely assert Chinese banner text. Per UX i18n Policy class 1 rule, match-existing now defaults to English. TASK-002 and TASK-003 convergence criteria call out the anti-regression check; if existing tests break on Chinese-by-default, they need cosmetic update to assert English-on-fallback explicitly.

quality_check.notes: All 6 quality dimensions pass cleanly. Plan is directly actionable — no auto-fixes applied, no regeneration needed.
